title: Smoky Pork Dumplings
description: A twist on traditional Chinese dumplings using smoky pork and intensely flavorful ingredients.
instructions: 2. In a large skillet, cook the ground pork over medium-high heat until browned, breaking it up with a spoon as it cooks.
3. Add the grated ginger, soy sauce, smoked paprika, salt, and black pepper to the skillet and stir to combine.
4. Let the mixture cool to room temperature.
5. Lay a wonton wrapper on a clean surface and place a tablespoon of the pork mixture in the center.
6. Dip your finger in water and run it along the edges of the wrapper.
7. Fold the wrapper into a triangle by bringing the two opposite corners together to form a point.
8. Press the edges together to seal the dumpling.
9. Repeat with the remaining wrappers and filling.
10. Place the dumplings on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper and brush with a little bit of oil.
11. Bake the dumplings in the preheated oven for 12-15 minutes, or until they are golden brown.
12. Serve the smoky pork dumplings hot with your favorite dipping sauce.
